title: vaccinium micranthum
intro: Vaccinium micranthum, also known as the small-fruit cranberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to eastern North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to prevent and treat urinary tract infections due to its high concentration of proanthocyanidins. The health benefits of Vaccinium micranthum include its potential to prevent kidney stones, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Vaccinium micranthum can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal supplement for maintaining overall health and well-being.
